prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 112.9 kg; Height 183.4 cm; BMI 33.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 144/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 196mg/dL; 6 months ago 197mg/dL; 3 months ago 184mg/dL; current 118mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 113.1kg; 9 months ago 114.1kg; 6 months ago 108.6kg; 3 months ago 109.2kg; current 112.9kg), Height (12 months ago 183.4cm; 9 months ago 183.4cm; 6 months ago 183.4cm; 3 months ago 183.4cm; current 183.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 147mmHg; 3 months ago 145mmHg; current 144mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; current 35mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 153mg/g; 9 months ago 167mg/g; 6 months ago 171mg/g; 3 months ago 184mg/g; current 164mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 185mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 170mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 178mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 10.1g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
